title: Optimize S7_RENDER_DOCS
description: S7_RENDER_DOCS accounts for 95.5% of pipeline time (avg 13m 25s). S7_RENDER_DOCS averages 13m 25s (96% of pipeline). This is the document rendering stage with LLM calls — primary bottleneck. Optimization paths: batch fewer templates, cache rendered docs, reduce prompt sizes, or parallelize rendering.
estimated_impact: Reduce average pipeline time by up to 4m 2s (29% reduction)
